Notice Of Motion For Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANTS SAI SHU, TESHA SHU'S MOTION FOR ORDER ENFORCING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: transferred to be heard in department 501, the real property and housing court, at 9:30 am on April 5, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelley DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)

Motion For Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven L. Hammond (415-984-8554) for Plaintiff/Cross-Deft/Moving party Sai Yu Shu.
Chistina Chen (415-441-8778) for Defendant/opposing party.

The Plaintiff/Cross-defense informs the court that a stipulation was signed and an agreement was made. Plaintiff confirms and presents the stipulation to the court.

Not argued. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

Cross-Defendants Sai Yu Shu and Tesha Chang Shu's Motion For Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement is taken off calendar. Parties have reached an agreement. Order signed in open court. (See scanned order for details). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501).
